title: Day 01 Reflection
description: Solidify what you learned by writing — not copying — your own understanding. These notes become searchable in FrontForge later.

prompts.question: In your own words, why does React exist? What problem would you have without it on a dashboard with 50 interactive widgets?
prompts.guidance: Think about manual DOM updates vs declaring UI from state. Mention maintainability, not just performance.

prompts.question: What is the difference between JSX and HTML? List at least three concrete differences you used today.
prompts.guidance: className, expressions in {}, closing tags, fragments — pick what you actually encountered.

prompts.question: Which bug did you hit while building the landing page — or which from the debugging section would have fooled you? How did you diagnose it?
prompts.guidance: Write the symptom, what you checked, and the fix. This is interview gold.

prompts.question: Why did you type component props with TypeScript instead of leaving them as any?
prompts.guidance: Connect to catching mistakes early and documenting the component API.

prompts.question: What would you improve on your landing page if you had one more hour?
prompts.guidance: Accessibility, spacing, copy, component extraction — prioritize like a senior engineer.
